auth.signUpJourney: Sign up to help protect your city
auth.forgotPasswordSubtitle: Enter your email to receive a password reset code.
auth.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters
auth.nameMinLength: Name must be at least 2 characters
auth.accountCreatedSuccess: Your account has been created successfully
auth.welcomeBackJourney: Join CivicTwinAI to help build a smarter city
auth.dataEncrypted: Your data is encrypted and secured
auth.accountSubtitle: Join CivicTwinAI to help build a smarter city
auth.loginSubtitle: Login to report and track urban incidents
auth.dataSecure: Your data is secured and encrypted

onboarding.welcomeDescription: Smart urban traffic management Digital Twin platform.
onboarding.mapDescription: Monitor traffic conditions, incidents, and vehicle density in real time.
onboarding.aiDescription: Receive congestion predictions and recommendations based on sensor data analysis.
onboarding.communityDescription: Report traffic incidents, share information, and help build a smarter city.

otp.enterCodeReset: Enter verification code to reset your password

changePassword.title: Change Password
changePassword.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
changePassword.enterStrongPassword: Create a strong password for your account
changePassword.verificationSuccessful: Your identity has been verified. Create a new password below.
changePassword.passwordResetFailed: Could not reset password. Please try again.

reports.title: Reports
reports.draftRestored: Draft restored from your previous session
reports.imageRequired: Please add at least one image
reports.maxImagesLimit: You can only upload up to 5 images/videos
reports.maxImagesHint: Up to 5 images (JPG, PNG). First image is analyzed by AI for suggestions; remaining images are attached to the report.
reports.selectCategoryHint: Select a category that matches the issue
reports.addImagesHint: Add images: AI reads the first image to suggest content; all images you choose will be attached when submitting the report.
reports.contentHint: When submitting, the title is generated from the category and address. Write a clear description; tap AI Parse if you want suggestions from your text.
reports.descriptionMinLength: Description must be at least 20 characters
reports.titleUpdatesFromCategory: Updates based on category (above) and address (Location section).
reports.gpsAutoHint: GPS was automatically obtained when opening the screen (if permitted). Tap "Select location on map" to adjust the point, then Confirm — address and coordinates will update accordingly.
reports.severityRatingHint: Rate the severity of the issue
reports.submitError: Cannot create report. Please try again.
reports.locationPermissionDesc: Location permission is needed to place the pin where you are standing.
reports.enableLocationInSettings: Enable location permission in Settings to use this feature.
reports.aiNoDescription: Please enter a description for AI to analyze.
reports.aiNotEnoughInfo: AI does not have enough information to analyze.
reports.aiFilledSuccess: AI has analyzed and filled in information successfully!
reports.aiParseError: Error when AI analyzes the description.
reports.sendingImageToAi: Sending image to AI for analysis...
reports.imageAnalyzeFailed: Cannot analyze image — will still upload image normally
reports.imageNotClear: Image is not clear enough to auto-fill the form.
reports.retakeAdvice: You should delete this image, retake (close, bright, clear issue) and add it again.
reports.aiAnalyzedImage: AI has analyzed the image{{confPct}} and filled in the form.
reports.reviewBeforeSending: Title when submitting includes incident type and your chosen location. Please review the description and location before sending.
reports.imageProcessingError: An error occurred while processing the image. Please try again.
reports.cameraPermissionError: Cannot open camera. Please check access permissions.
reports.cannotSelectImage: Cannot select image. Please try again.
reports.aiAutoFilledFields: AI has automatically filled in the information fields
reports.aiReadingImages: AI is reading images — usually takes a few seconds, please wait.
reports.uploadingImagesWait: Uploading images — please wait and keep the network stable.
reports.suggestionsApplied: Suggestions have been applied to the form — you can edit them before submitting.
reports.reportSubmitted: Your report has been submitted successfully!
reports.emptyComments: No comments yet. Be the first!
reports.ratingSubtitle: How do you feel about the processing result of this report?

profile.title: Profile
profile.signOutConfirm: Are you sure you want to sign out?
profile.profileUpdateFailed: Failed to update profile. Please try again.
profile.avatarUploadFailed: Failed to upload avatar. Please try again.
profile.logoutConfirm: Are you sure you want to logout?
profile.createFirstReport: Create your first report to help improve the city
profile.notEditableDesc: Report is in status "{{status}}". Can only edit when status is Received or Verified.
profile.notDeletableDesc: Report being processed or completed cannot be deleted (status: "{{status}}").
profile.reportDeleteFailed: Failed to delete report. Please try again.
profile.confirmDeleteReportDesc: Are you sure you want to delete this report? This action cannot be undone.
profile.reportSentSuccess: Your report has been sent successfully!

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.notificationsWillAppear: When there are report updates or related incidents, you will see them here.
notifications.systemNotifications: Notifications from CivicTwin system and your report updates.

errors.sessionExpiredMessage: Session has expired, please login again.
errors.sessionExpiredSandbox: Your session has expired. Please login again to continue.
errors.accessDenied: You do not have access permission.

map.title: Map
map.tapMapHint: Tap the map to select a location
map.tapToSelectLocation: Tap on the map to select a location
map.locationPermissionDesc: Location permission is needed to center the map on your position.

emailVerification.title: Verify Email
emailVerification.subtitle: Verify your email to activate your account
emailVerification.subtitleCodeSent: Enter the verification code sent to your email
emailVerification.sendCodeDescription: We will send a verification code to your email address
emailVerification.codeSentDescription: A 6-digit code was sent to your email. Please enter it below.
emailVerification.checkingDescription: Please wait while we check your email verification status.
emailVerification.emailVerifiedDescription: Your email has been verified. You can close this screen.
emailVerification.otpIncorrect: Incorrect OTP code. Please try again.
emailVerification.getEmailError: Could not fetch email address. Please try again.
emailVerification.sendOtpFailed: Failed to send verification code. Please try again.

phoneVerification.title: Verify Phone
phoneVerification.subtitle: Verify your phone number to activate your account
phoneVerification.subtitleCodeSent: Enter the verification code sent to your phone
phoneVerification.sendCodeDescription: We will send a verification code to your phone number
phoneVerification.codeSentDescription: A 6-digit code was sent to your phone. Please enter it below.
phoneVerification.checkingDescription: Please wait while we check your phone verification status.
phoneVerification.phoneVerifiedDescription: Your phone has been verified. You can close this screen.
phoneVerification.otpIncorrect: Incorrect OTP code. Please try again.
phoneVerification.getPhoneError: Could not fetch phone number. Please try again.
phoneVerification.sendOtpFailed: Failed to send verification code. Please try again.
